zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall於1099年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利代內斯坦維爾時，他的父親Henry I King of England32歲，母親Sybil Corbet22歲。他於大約1130年與Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆結婚。他於1173年被列為high sheriff of devon。他去世於1175年7月1日在英國素瑞傑千享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall于1099年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利代內斯坦維爾时，他的父亲Henry I King of England32岁，母亲Sybil Corbet22岁。他于大约1130年与Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville在英国巴金哈姆爾維可姆结婚。他于1173年被列为high sheriff of devon。他去世于1175年7月1日在英国素瑞傑千享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall was born in 1099, in Dénestanville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Henry I King of England, was 32 and his mother, Sybil Corbet, was 22. He married Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville about 1130, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. In 1173, his occupation is listed as high sheriff of devon. He died on 1 July 1175, in Chertsey, Surrey, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Blaenllyfni, Brecon, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall est né en 1099, à Dénestanville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Henry I King of England, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sybil Corbet, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville environ 1130, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. En 1173, sa profession de son indiquée est high sheriff of devon. Il est décédé le 1 juillet 1175, à Chertsey, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall 1099 in Dénestanville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry I King of England 32 und seine Mutter Sybil Corbet 22. Er hat um 1130 in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville geheiratet. 1173 ist sein Beruf als high sheriff of devon aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Juli 1175 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Chertsey, Surrey, England und wurde in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Blaenllyfni, Brecon, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall è nato il nel 1099 nel Dénestanville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Henry I King of England, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Corbet, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville circa 1130, nel Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England. Nel 1173, la sua occupazione è indicata come high sheriff of devon. Morì il 1 luglio 1175, nel Chertsey, Surrey, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Reading, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwallが1099年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメドeネスタンヴィルで生まれた時，父Henry I King of Englandは32歳，母Sybil Corbetは22歳であった。約1130年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウイコンベでRobert or Regina Mrs Dunstanvilleと結婚した。1173年，職業はhigh sheriff of devonと記録されている。彼は1175年7月1日にイギリススリーチェルトセイで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall(이)가 1099년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 드e네스탠빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry I King of England(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Corbet(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1130년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville(와)과 결혼했다. 1173년, 그의 직업은 high sheriff of devon이었다. 그는 1175년 7월 1일 영국 수리 처츠이에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에 묻혔다.

pt.from 8 Jan 1173 to 7 Jan 1175: de 8 de janeiro de 1173 a 7 de janeiro de 1175
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall nasceu em 1099, em Dénestanville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Henry I King of England, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Corbet, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville aproximadamente 1130, em Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Em 1173, sua profissão aparece como high sheriff of devon. Ele faleceu em 1 de julho de 1175, em Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Blaenllyfni, Brecon, Wales: Brecon, Powys, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall родился в 1099 г. в местности дeнестанвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Henry I King of England было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil Corbet, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville около 1130 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия. В 1173 году он работал по профессии high sheriff of devon. Он умер 1 июля 1175 г. в местности чирци, сурри, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.from 8 Jan 1173 to 7 Jan 1175: desde 8 de enero de 1173 hasta 7 de enero de 1175
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall nació en 1099, en Dénestanville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Henry I King of England, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sybil Corbet, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Robert or Regina Mrs Dunstanville aproximadamente 1130, en Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. En 1173, su ocupación registrada era high sheriff of devon. Murió el 1 de julio de 1175, en Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
